lang: python
file: safe.py
---
import re

PATTERN = re.compile(r"^\d+$")

def only_uses_module_level_pattern(value: str) -> bool:
    return bool(PATTERN.match(value))

def compiles_exactly_once_then_iterates(values):
    pattern = re.compile(r"[a-z]+")
    out = []
    for v in values:
        out.append(pattern.match(v))
    return out
